title: Datenschutzerklärung
summary: German-language privacy policy draft copy for Anchor's /datenschutz route, covering processors, cookie-consent-free posture, and GDPR data-subject rights.
notes: Prose-heavy legal source-of-truth copy (not a decision, requirement set, or technical contract). References compliance requirements (CR-001..CR-011) and ADR-0021 but is itself documentation/content destined for a page.tsx route, so classified DOC.
